steps.t: Lenglammel is in Gwathrendath, the Elf-camp among the Foundations of Stone. You have destroyed the relic of Gorothúl and sent both Gwathnor and Grawul…
Haldir is on Talan Haldir, just outside the border of the Golden Wood. Lenglammel has sent you to Haldir to relay a message of importance: the expedit…
